name: judgment-src
description: This repository contains general Codex project workflow governance skills and local plugin sources. It keeps routing, work decomposition, five-agent review, XA/XB development gates, AI/Agent safety rules, evidence checks, and dirty-worktree safety under version control for use across projects.

scripts.check:agent-office: node --check agent-office/app.js && node --check agent-office/mockData.js && node --check scripts/agent-office-bridge.js && node --check scripts/controller-agent-office-inbox.js
